name: Deterministic Invincibility
description: The mathematical elimination of regressions and unhandled edge cases across the entire distributed network. Every possible state transition, failure mode, and multi-agent race condition is deterministically proven before deployment.
successCriteria:
1. The `TestOrchestrator` simulates not just the Hub, but the actual Architect and Engineer clients (including their local caches and network transports) in a sandboxed "Dry Run" (Idea-12).
2. Code is never merged to `main` unless the entire multi-agent graph is proven to resolve successfully under simulated chaos.
